title: Hut 8 Bitcoin Mining Coverage and Analysis
text: Hut 8 Mining Operations and Strategy. Coverage of Hut 8's Bitcoin mining operations and strategic direction. Mining efficiency improvements through ASIC upgrades. Hash rate expansion targets. Energy cost optimization. Balance between Bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure build-out. 26.8 EH/s installed hash rate with 23.7 EH/s operational. 1,020 MW energy capacity under management with 8,650 MW pipeline.
